name: Provable Regime Strategy Skill
description: A CoinMarketCap Agent-Hub Skill that classifies the live crypto market regime (TREND_UP / TREND_DOWN / CHOP / RISK_OFF) and emits a deterministic, backtestable strategy spec. Every live signal is appended to a public, CI-verified sha256 hash-chain - a tamper-evident track record any agent can verify before paying. Served over the x402 protocol (USDC) on Base.
